title: phacelia humilis var. humilis
intro: Phacelia humilis var. humilis, also known as dwarf phacelia, is a low-growing annual plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, as well as its antiviral and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phacelia humilis var. humilis include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Phacelia humilis var. humilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
